name: 11ai-llm-costs
description: Single-thread, project-scoped, and machine-wide LLM cost reports with provider-verified pricing maintenance.

interface.shortDescription: Single-thread, project, and global LLM reports.
interface.longDescription: Analyze local Codex, Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Cline, Roo Code, OpenCode, and exported usage. Generate single-thread, project-scoped, or machine-wide reports with detailed cost aggregates, wall time, estimated active time, pricing coverage, and thread detail; refresh all bundled pricing catalogs from official provider sources.
defaultPrompt: Analyze LLM costs for this project.
Analyze the cost and timing of this LLM thread.
Create a machine-wide LLM cost report.
Show LLM token totals and cost aggregates.
Refresh the bundled LLM pricing catalogs from official sources.
